prompt: Create a clean luxury skincare product advertisement in a square 1:1 layout with a warm beige studio background and strong natural sunlight casting soft palm-leaf shadows across the wall. Place 1 amber glass dropper bottle on the left-center, standing upright on a round cream stone pedestal. The bottle has a glossy gold collar and a matte white rubber dropper top. Add a white rectangular label with elegant minimal typography: brand name "{argument name="brand name" default="NATURELLE SKINCARE"}" at the top, a large orange product name "{argument name="product name" default="VITAMIN C"}", then black text reading "BRIGHTENING SERUM" and smaller subtext "With Hyaluronic Acid & Niacinamide". Surround the pedestal with 3 visible glossy green tropical leaves, arranged from the left edge and behind the bottle for a fresh botanical look. On the right side, place a large bold black serif headline in 3 stacked lines reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Glow Naturally. Every Day."}". Beneath it, add a smaller clean sans-serif benefits line reading "{argument name="benefits text" default="Brightens | Hydrates | Protects"}". Below that, include 3 circular black outline ingredient or values icons in a horizontal row, each with a simple leaf-style symbol inside; add tiny caption text beneath them with the same slightly imperfect ad-like wording seen in the original, including "Barban Free", "Dermicologyg", and "Creuty-free". At the lower right, place a glossy rounded green call-to-action button with white bold text "{argument name="button text" default="Shop Now"}". Add 1 sliced orange on the far right edge, partially cropped, with vivid juicy texture to reinforce the vitamin C theme. Include a small white "Pollo.ai" watermark in the top-right corner. Style the whole image as a polished commercial product mockup, photorealistic, high-end beauty branding, soft warm highlights, subtle shadows, balanced composition, sharp label detail, premium ecommerce social ad aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 创建一个方形 1:1 比例的简洁奢华护肤品广告，背景为温暖的米色摄影棚，强烈的自然阳光在墙上投射出柔和的棕榈叶阴影。在左中位置放置 1 个琥珀色玻璃滴管瓶，直立在圆形的奶油色石质底座上。瓶子配有光泽的金色瓶颈和哑光白色橡胶滴管头。添加一个白色长方形标签，上面印有优雅简约的排版：顶部为品牌名称 "{argument name="brand name" default="NATURELLE SKINCARE"}"，下方为醒目的橙色产品名称 "{argument name="product name" default="VITAMIN C"}"，接着是黑色的 "BRIGHTENING SERUM" 字样，以及较小的副标题 "With Hyaluronic Acid & Niacinamide"。在底座周围放置 3 片光泽的绿色热带叶子，从左侧边缘延伸至瓶子后方，营造出清新的植物感。在右侧，放置一行 3 层堆叠的粗体黑色衬线标题，内容为 "{argument name="headline text" default="Glow Naturally. Every Day."}"。在标题下方，添加一行较小的简洁无衬线功效说明，内容为 "{argument name="benefits text" default="Brightens | Hydrates | Protects"}"。下方横向排列 3 个圆形黑色轮廓的成分或价值图标，每个图标内含一个简单的叶子符号；在图标下方添加微小的说明文字，采用与原版广告中略显不完美的风格，包括 "Barban Free"、"Dermicologyg" 和 "Creuty-free"。在右下角放置一个光泽的圆形绿色行动呼吁按钮，上面印有白色粗体文字 "{argument name="button text" default="Shop Now"}"。在最右侧边缘放置 1 片切开的橙子，部分被裁剪，呈现出生动多汁的质感，以强化维生素 C 的主题。在右上角添加一个小的白色 "Pollo.ai" 水印。将整张图片设计为精致的商业产品样机，照片级真实感，高端美妆品牌风格，柔和温暖的高光，微妙的阴影，平衡的构图，清晰的标签细节，优质的电商社交广告美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 维生素 C 护肤品广告：一个精致的方形护肤品广告，展示了带有植物风格的维生素 C 精华液瓶、醒目的标题文字、功效图标以及用于电商或社交媒体营销的“立即购买”按钮。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, luxury, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
